tuning: E A D G B E
content:
“I Try” – Macy Gray
Chords by Joan’s Genius 2000


Verse 1:
[tab][ch]E[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Games, changes and fears[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
When will they go from here, when will they stop[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
I believe that fate has brought us here[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
And we should be together, babe, but we’re not[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreamin of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep it cool but I'm fiendin'[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
I try to say goodbye and I choke, I try to walk away and I stumble[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]
Though I try to hide it it's clear, my world crumbles when you are not here[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
Goodbye and I choke, try to walk away and I stumble [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]
Though I try to hide it, it's clear, my world crumbles when you are not here[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]E[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
I may appear to be free[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
But I'm just a prisoner of your love[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
I may seem alright and smile when you leave[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]B[/ch]
But my smiles are just a front, just a front[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]
I play it off but I'm dreamin of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I'll keep my cool but I'm fiendin’[/tab]


(Repeat Chorus)

Bridge:
[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
  Here is my confession[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
May I be your possesion[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Boy I need your touch[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Your love kisses and such[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
With all my might I try[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch],    [ch]E[/ch]
But this I can't deny, deny[/tab]


(Repeat last 2 lines of either Verse, then Chorus)
